title: Route memory doctor through portable primitives

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Reduce memory.doctor non-verbose JSON from generated runtime override code to portable operation IR primitives.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to memory.doctor JSON non-verbose behavior. Preserve verbose/text fallback through explicit package-domain runtime. Do not hand-edit generated outputs.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Reuse the codegen-owned toml.table.counts primitive and payload assembly pattern from memory.status.
canonical_core.escalate_when: Doctor behavior requires memory package policy beyond deterministic target-root, TOML table counting, payload assembly, and JSON/text emission.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement memory.doctor JSON non-verbose with portable primitives, regenerate outputs, validate, and close this slice.
completion_criteria: memory.doctor JSON non-verbose no longer depends on the generated _load_memory_bootstrap_doctor TOML-table override; it executes through portable operation IR primitives with verbose/text fallback still explicit.

execution_run.what happened: memory.doctor non-verbose JSON was moved from a generated memory_runtime TOML-table override into portable operation IR using path.target_root.resolve, toml.table.counts, payload.assemble, and output.emit; verbose/text doctor still uses the explicit package runtime fallback.
execution_run.scope touched: memory.doctor operation contract, adapter/command-package/inventory contracts, generated memory/typescript projections, generated-package proof guard, and planning surfaces
execution_run.changed surfaces: generated memory doctor operation, generated memory runtime facade, generated TypeScript metadata, and python-operation execution inventory
execution_run.validations run: contract tooling; generated command packages; generated Python conformance; generated package Node/Docker/Docker-conformance; focused memory doctor test; ruff check
execution_run.result for continuation: memory.doctor JSON compact behavior is no longer generic deterministic runtime debt; continue #892 with the next safe runtime delegate reduction.
execution_run.next step: Select another bounded runtime delegate candidate.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_report.py::test_memory_lifecycle_tiny_does_not_collect_full_status -q; uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py
proof_report.proof achieved now: memory.doctor JSON compact path executes through portable operation IR primitives and generated package proof is green
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: generated/memory/python/operations/memory.doctor.report.json contains toml.table.counts and payload.assemble; generated/memory/python/primitives/memory_runtime.py no longer contains a doctor JSON fast-path override.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded memory.doctor JSON compact path moved to portable primitives, but the wider #892 runtime-delegate epic still has other domain-runtime and compatibility fallbacks.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: memory.doctor verbose/text fallback remains explicit package-domain debt.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen only if memory.doctor compact JSON regresses to generated runtime override or package runtime import.
